title: Social Carousel
description: Key design elements for swipeable social media carousel cards, Xiaohongshu posts, and campaign card sequences.

question_templates.question: 发布平台是什么：小红书、Instagram、LinkedIn、朋友圈，还是其他？
这组轮播要达成什么目标：种草、教育、转化、活动预热、复盘，还是招聘？
每张卡片大致讲什么？如果没有，我可以按 hook-痛点-方法-证据-行动 来假设。
第一张卡片的钩子想突出什么？
视觉更偏小红书生活方式、专业知识卡、品牌活动、杂志感，还是让系统推荐？

defaults.output_contract: standalone responsive HTML social carousel storyboard
defaults.primary_user: social feed viewer deciding whether to keep swiping, save, or click through
defaults.business_domain: social content marketing and educational storytelling
defaults.decision_goal: turn the message into a swipeable sequence with a strong hook and clear final CTA
defaults.visual_direction: platform-native carousel cards with bold hooks, repeated visual rhythm, and readable mobile typography
